_meta.debate_topic: 影行者 Q 版風格 + 116 件資產量產 + APK 圖像豐富版交付

voices.codex_cto: STALLED — kill at 2min no-CPU (sess 3 pattern repeat). lessons say substitute self-verdict.
voices.auditor_clean_window: scheduled post Phase 1 (5 red-line 模型上線 trigger)

_meta.convergence: 2/3 voice GO-WITH-PHASES (Codex absent counted as abstain per fault-tolerant quorum)
_meta.constitutional_basis: feedback_three_model_debate_universal_intent_constitutional — 跨家族意見對齊已達，Codex stall 已落 lesson 10

agreed_decisions.A_style: hybrid-with-tension — 怪獸 sprite 以 Octopath 親和力為主，但配件保留古銅金紋路（玉珮/篆書印章作為視覺錨點），legendary 階特別放大古銅張力（光暈、浮空崩裂壇）。同質中保異質。

B_phased_plan.scope: 25 species × common (canonical wuxing) + pubspec assets 註冊 + Flutter sprite_resolver + APK rebuild + 上 GDrive
25 rare + Auditor fresh window 審 Phase 1 + APK rebuild
25 legendary + 11 UI + 10 item icon + APK rebuild
12 scene + 4 portrait 縮圖 + final APK rebuild

agreed_decisions.C_flutter_integration: MESSY-BUT-TRACTABLE — 命名 species_pinyin_rarity.jpg、Image.asset + fallback Icon、ColorFiltered widget 套五行、precacheImage on init
D_blockers_acknowledged: Gemini Image rate limit 未知 → 加 5s sleep + 429 retry
風格漂移 → 每 8 張人工抽樣對比 spec sample_filled_prompt
APK 體積首啟動延遲 → precacheImage 解決
agreed_decisions.E_minority_report: Gemini: IP 肅穆感稀釋風險。Cymon mitigation: hybrid 配件 + legendary 古銅張力放大。Phase 1 結束強制 Simon 看一次拍板。

phase_1_action_items: 重生 帝江幼形 earth/common v2（採影行者風格基準）作為新 prompt template 校準
若 v2 通過 Simon 直觀確認，順跑剩 24 species common = 25 圖
Flutter: 新增 lib/sprite_resolver.dart 寫死 pinyin map + path 組裝
MonsterCard 改 Image.asset(spriteResolver.path(species, rarity)) + errorBuilder fallback
ColorFiltered 包 sprite 套 5 個 wuxing ColorMatrix (echo_theme.dart 已有 EchoColors.wuxing)
Compress + downscale 圖到 512px JPG，預估每張 ~70KB
flutter build apk --release → cp 到 GDrive/builds/yingwu-echo-v0.5-phase1.apk

critical_gaps: 缺乏明確的 DB schema migration 當前版本號與狀態
未明確聲明 Git 工作區是否處於完全 clean 狀態
redundancy: 第 8 節（辯論軌跡）與第 10 節（17 條哲學）過長
